name: Fakeنيترو
description: إرسال ايموجي مزيفة (تجاوز صلاحية الايموجي المخصصة أيضاً)

settings.enableEmojiBypass: Allows sending fake ايموجيز (also bypasses missing permission to use custom ايموجيز)
settings.emojiSize: Size of the ايموجيز when sending
settings.transformEmojis: Whether to transform fake ايموجيز into real ones
settings.enableStickerBypass: Allows sending fake ستيكرات (also bypasses missing permission to use ستيكرات)
settings.stickerSize: Size of the ستيكرات when sending
settings.transformStickers: Whether to transform fake ستيكرات into real ones
settings.transformCompoundSentence: Whether to transform fake ستيكرات and ايموجيز in compound sentences (sentences with more content than just the fake ايموجي or ستيكر link)
settings.useHyperLinks: Whether to use hyperlinks when sending fake ايموجيز and ستيكرات
settings.hyperLinkText: What text the hyperlink should use. {{NAME}} will be replaced with the ايموجي/ستيكر name.
settings.disableEmbedPermissionCheck: Whether to disable the embed permission check when sending fake ايموجيز and ستيكرات
